name: fleet-refresh-0-21-6
title: Roll out SD pack 0.23.3 to the consumer fleet
description: Refresh all configured consumers from their current installed version to release 0.23.3 through the canonical fleet preflight, sequential PR, review, merge, provenance, and audit process.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Retargeted from 0.21.6 to 0.23.1 after explicit operator selection, to 0.23.2 after rwbp-coordinator PR #126 surfaced source evidence-validation defects, and to 0.23.3 after its fresh review surfaced an unsanitized terminal status snapshot; the task slug is retained for continuity.
